description: The SigningBackend trait contract (secretx-core) requires public_key_der() to return DER-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo. The TPM2 implementation (lib.rs:365-371) marshals the TPM2B_PUBLIC structure via PublicBuffer and returns those bytes. TPM2B_PUBLIC is a TPM-specific format, not SPKI DER. Any caller that tries to parse the result with a standard PKCS#8/SPKI parser (as the PKCS#11 integration test does with p256::pkcs8::DecodePublicKey or rsa::pkcs8::DecodePublicKey) will fail. The implementation needs to extract the raw public key fields from the TPM2B_PUBLIC and construct a proper SPKI DER encoding (e.g. using the p256 or rsa crates, or manual ASN.1 construction).
title: public_key_der returns TPM2B_PUBLIC, not SPKI DER
